headline: How Hubbell (HUBB) Is Expanding Around AI-Driven Electrical Infrastructure Demand
summary: Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE:HUBB) is one of the best grid modernization stocks to buy for AI infrastructure. On May 4, Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE:HUBB) announced a definitive agreement to acquire NSI Industries for $3.0 billion in cash. NSI makes electrical fittings, connectors, components, and wire-management products for industrial, infrastructure, and commercial markets, and Hubbell said the deal […]
